revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:778年]] [[ab:Category:778 шықәса]] [[an:Category:778]] [[ar:Category:778]] [[ast:Category:778]] [[az:Category:778]] [[be_x_old:Category:778]] [[be:Category:778]] [[bg:Category:778 година]] [[bh:Category:778]] [[bn:Category:৭৭৮]] [[bpy:Category:মারি ৭৭৮]] [[br:Category:778]] [[bs:Category:778.]] [[cdo:Category:778 nièng]] [[ceb:Category:778]] [[ckb:Category:٧٧٨]] [[commons:Category:778]] [[cs:Category:778]] [[cy:Category:778]] [[da:Category:778]] [[de:Category:778]] [[eo:Category:778]] [[es:Category:778]] [[et:Category:778]] [[eu:Category:778]] [[fa:Category:۷۷۸ (میلادی)]] [[fi:Category:778]] [[fr:Category:778]] [[fy:Category:778]] [[gan:Category:778年]] [[gl:Category:778]] [[he:Category:778]] [[hu:Category:778]] [[hy:Category:778]] [[id:Category:778]] [[is:Category:778]] [[jv:Category:778]] [[ka:Category:778]] [[kk:Category:778 жыл]] [[ko:Category:778년]] [[ku:Category:778]] [[la:Category:778]] [[lb:Category:778]] [[lv:Category:778. gads]] [[mk:Category:778]] [[mn:Category:778 он]] [[mr:Category:इ.स. ७७८]] [[ms:Category:778]] [[my:Category:၇၇၈]] [[new:Category:७७८]] [[no:Category:778]] [[oc:Category:778]] [[or:Category:୭୭୮]] [[os:Category:778]] [[pt:Category:778]] [[qu:Category:778]] [[ro:Category:778]] [[ru:Category:778 год]] [[sa:Category:७७८]] [[shn:Category:778]] [[sh:Category:778.]] [[simple:Category:778]] [[sk:Category:778]] [[sl:Category:Leto 778]] [[smn:Category:778]] [[sq:Category:778]] [[sr:Category:778.]] [[sv:Category:778]] [[sw:Category:778]] [[tg:Category:Соли 778]] [[tr:Category:778]] [[tt:Category:778 ел]] [[uk:Category:778]] [[ur:Category:778ء]] [[uz:Category:778]] [[vi:Category:Năm 778]] [[war:Category:778]] [[zh_min_nan:Category:778 nî]] [[zh_yue:Category:778年]] [[zh:Category:778年]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Chigata Shrine]].

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6659586)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
